purpose: Track year-specific trail closures, construction, and organizer adjustments that can explain target-count and mileage changes across Boise Trails Challenge years.
source_note: Events in this file come from user-provided excerpts from past Boise Trails Challenge emails. The local repo search found matching trail names in planner artifacts, but not the original email source text. Treat this as documented working evidence until the original emails are archived.

events.title: Heroes Trail access and Bogus Basin XC construction
events.summary: Organizer email noted the hospital parking lot at the south end of Heroes Trail was being redone until June 22, requiring athletes to wait or do an out-and-back from Elephant Rock. It also noted significant Bogus Basin XC trail changes, including Lower Deer Point closure.
events.likely_modeling_impact: A planner should not assume normal trailhead access or normal Bogus XC connector topology during the affected window. This may not change final segment counts, but it changes practical route feasibility.
events.source: User-provided pasted excerpt from past Boise Trails Challenge email.

events.title: Polecat Gulch fire closure
events.summary: Organizer email noted a fire closed Polecat Gulch. Organizers had not fully removed it from the challenge at that point, but temporarily marked Polecat complete for athletes who had completed everything else while they waited to see if it would reopen.
events.likely_modeling_impact: Public final completion math may include organizer-side administrative credit or removal logic that differs from a static pre-event official segment file.
events.source: User-provided pasted excerpt from past Boise Trails Challenge email.

events.title: Ridge Road and Mahalo access closure
events.summary: Organizer email noted the Forest Service closed Ridge Road, limiting access to Mahalo, and acknowledged that participants had to adapt.
events.likely_modeling_impact: This is a plausible explanation for the 2025 mismatch between the local planner file and public final history target. The local file may reflect an initial/static official set while public final completion math reflects post-closure organizer adjustments.
events.source: User-provided pasted excerpt from past Boise Trails Challenge email.
